text.title: Focus Groups Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-segments-and-recruit
step.action: Define segments; recruit 7-11 per group × >=3 groups per segment.

step.name: author-discussion-guide
step.action: Structure: warm-up + 3 topics with probe ladders + late concept reveal + wrap-up.

step.name: moderate-groups
step.action: Trained moderator runs each group; written-first per topic; reveal late.

step.name: analyse
step.action: Cluster verbatim quotes into themes; reject themes supported by <2 groups.
